idx:
objective:'Connect swing lows so the line supports the up-move and respects 2–3 touches.',prompt:'Tap two swing lows',
  gen:(s,d)=>{const n=DIFF_N[d],vol=DIFF_VOL[d],r=rng(s),base=60,slope=vol*0.5+1.0,cs=[];for(let i=0;i<n;i++){const lineLo=base+i*slope,c=lineLo+(1.6+r()*3)*vol*0.4+Math.sin(i*0.8)*vol*0.5,o=i?cs[i-1].c:c;cs.push({o,c,hi:Math.max(o,c)+vol*0.4,lo:Math.min(o,c,lineLo+r()*0.4*vol)-vol*0.2});}const pv=pivots(cs,2),lows=pv.L.length>=2?pv.L:[Math.floor(n*0.2),Math.floor(n*0.6)];return{cs,lows,extra:[]};},

cq: gen:function(s,d){var r=rng(s),t=['bull','bear'][Math.floor(r()*2)],j=function(){return (r()-0.5)*6;},O,C,H,L,desc,signal,ctx=null,prevClose=null,ctxHi=null,ctxLo=null;   /* OPEN/CLOSE only — wick lessons live elsewhere (e.g. liquidity). Always bull/bear with context. */

else if(variant==='ray'){addHTML('
press UNDER a candle, then DRAG to draw the support line
');let p0=null;cv.onpointerdown=e=>{const p=xy(e);p0={i:V.indexAt(p.x),v:V.priceAt(p.y)};pts=[p0,p0];RESP=pts;draw();cv.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);cv.onpointermove=ev=>{const q=xy(ev);pts=[p0,{i:V.indexAt(q.x),v:V.priceAt(q.y)}];RESP=pts;draw();sub.disabled=(pts[1].i===p0.i);};};cv.onpointerup=()=>cv.onpointermove=null;}
idx:
else if(variant==='ray'){addHTML('
tap two swing lows
');cv.onpointerdown=e=>{const i=V.indexAt(xy(e).x);pts.push({i,v:STATE.cs[i].lo});if(pts.length>2)pts=[pts[pts.length-1]];RESP=pts;draw();sub.disabled=pts.length<2;};}

cq: function runBuild(){sub.style.display='block';sub.disabled=false;sub.textContent='CONFIRM';var x=cv.getContext('2d'),dpr=Math.min(devicePixelRatio||1,2);cv.width=cv.clientWidth*dpr;cv.height=cv.clientHeight*dpr;x.setTransform(dpr,0,0,dpr,0,0);var W=cv.width/dpr,H=cv.height/dpr,top=58,bot=H-30,cx=W/2,Y=function(v){return top+(1-v/100)*(bot-top);},pAt=function(py){return clamp((1-(py-top)/(bot-top))*100,0,100);};resp={open:38,close:64};var drag=null,hs=function(){return [['open',cx-30,resp.open,'#ffd60a'],['close',cx+30,resp.close,'#16c784']];};function draw(){x.clearRect(0,0,W,H);x.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.05)';for(var g=0;g<=4;g++){var gy=top+g/4*(bot-top);x.beginPath();x.moveTo(0,gy);x.lineTo(W,gy);x.stroke();}if(st.ctx){var _n=st.ctx.length,_stp=(cx-72)/(_n+1);for(var _ci=0;_ci<_n;_ci++){var _c=st.ctx[_ci],_gx=28+_stp*(_ci+1),_gu=_c.c>=_c.o,_gc=_gu?'#16c784':'#ea3943',_gh=Math.max(_c.hi,_c.o,_c.c),_gl=Math.min(_c.lo,_c.o,_c.c);x.strokeStyle=_gc;x.lineWidth=1.5;x.beginPath();x.moveTo(_gx,Y(_gh));x.lineTo(_gx,Y(_gl));x.stroke();var _bt=Y(Math.max(_c.o,_c.c)),_bb=Y(Math.min(_c.o,_c.c));x.fillStyle=_gc;x.fillRect(_gx-8,_bt,16,Math.max(2,_bb-_bt));}x.strokeStyle='rgba(255,214,10,0.7)';x.setLineDash([5,4]);x.lineWidth=1.4;x.beginPath();x.moveTo(0,Y(st.prevClose));x.lineTo(W,Y(st.prevClose));x.stroke();x.setLineDash([]);x.fillStyle='rgba(255,214,10,0.92)';x.font='800 9px sans-serif';x.textAlign='left';x.fillText('OPEN HERE',4,Y(st.prevClose)-4);}var up=resp.close>=resp.open,col=up?'#16c784':'#ea3943';var bt=Y(Math.max(resp.open,resp.close)),bb=Y(Math.min(resp.open,resp.close));x.fillStyle=col;x.fillRect(cx-8,bt,16,Math.max(2,bb-bt));/* SHOT 14 — same width as the context candles (was 44, ~3× too wide) */hs().forEach(function(h){x.fillStyle=h[3];x.beginPath();x.arc(h[1],Y(h[2]),9,0,7);x.fill();x.fillStyle='#04060b';x.font='800 9px sans-serif';x.textAlign='center';x.fillText(h[0]==='open'?'O':'C',h[1],Y(h[2])+3);x.fillStyle=h[3];x.font='800 12px sans-serif';x.textAlign=(h[0]==='open')?'right':'left';x.fillText(h[0].toUpperCase(),h[1]+((h[0]==='open')?-15:15),Y(h[2])+4);});x.fillStyle='#7d8aa0';x.font='11px sans-serif';x.textAlign='center';x.fillText('drag the OPEN and CLOSE handles',cx,bot+18);}draw();var pick=function(p){var b=null,bd=1e9;hs().forEach(function(h){var d=Math.hypot(p.x-h[1],p.y-Y(h[2]));if(d<bd){bd=d;b=h[0];}});return b;};cv.onpointerdown=function(e){var p=xy(e);drag=pick(p);resp[drag]=pAt(p.y);draw();cv.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);cv.onpointermove=function(ev){resp[drag]=pAt(xy(ev).y);draw();};};cv.onpointerup=function(){cv.onpointermove=null;};sub.onclick=commit;}

9px sans-serif';x.textAlign='left';x.fillText('OPEN HERE',4,Y(st.prevClose)-4);}var up=resp.close>=resp.open,col=up?'#16c784':'#ea3943',hi=Math.max(resp.high,resp.open,resp.close),lo=Math.min(resp.low,resp.open,resp.close);x.strokeStyle=col;x.lineWidth=2;x.beginPath();x.moveTo(cx,Y(hi));x.lineTo(cx,Y(lo));x.stroke();var bt=Y(Math.max(resp.open,resp.close)),bb=Y(Math.min(resp.open,resp.close));x.fillStyle=col;x.fillRect(cx-8,bt,16,Math.max(2,bb-bt));/* SHOT 14 — same width as the context candles (was 44, ~3× too wide) */hs().forEach(function(h){x.fillStyle=h[3];x.beginPath();x.arc(h[1],Y(h[2]),8,0,7);x.fill();x.fillStyle='#04060b';x.font='800 8px sans-serif';x.textAlign='center';x.fillText(h[0][0].toUpperCase(),h[1],Y(h[2])+3);});x.fillStyle='#7d8aa0';x.font='10px sans-serif';x.textAlign='center';x.fillText('drag  O · C · H · L',cx,bot+18);}draw();var pick=function(p){var b=null,bd=1e9;hs().forEach(function(h){var d=Math.hypot(p.x-h[1],p.y-Y(h[2]));if(d<bd){bd=d;b=h[0];}});return b;};cv.onpointerdown=function(e){var p=xy(e);drag=pick(p);resp[drag]=pAt(p.y);draw();cv.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);cv.onpointermove=function(ev){resp[drag]=pAt(xy(ev).y);draw();};};cv.onpointerup=function(){cv.onpointermove=null;};sub.onclick=commit;}
